# Feature: Scan merge lean (Issue 1)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-09 -->

## Intent
Use a single `KnowledgeGraph` and single `buildEntityGraph` per `autoguide scan` so fact merge and entity graph output are deterministic — foundation for clean engine integration tests.

Roadmap: Clean Test Basis (Stufe A) — `.qa/design/clean-test-basis.md` Issue 1.

## Preconditions
- `autoguide.config.json` exists (`autoguide init`)
- Minimal matrix: `--noAi` scans used in CI integration tests
- `KnowledgeGraph.mergeFacts` and `buildEntityGraph` / `linkRecordsToGraph` in `@autoguide/core`

## Happy Path
- [ ] Given extra facts from source/runtime/plugins, after `runScan`, one `KnowledgeGraph` instance accumulated merges (initial, AI additions only, plugin transforms) without resetting the store
- [ ] Given AI proposals, only newly appended AI facts are merged into the graph (no duplicate provenance from re-merging existing facts)
- [ ] Given page/feature records, `buildEntityGraph` runs once; `linkRecordsToGraph` enriches records; `graph.json` is written from that graph
- [ ] `pages.json` / `features.json` IDs are consistent with `graph.json` relationships (integration assertion)
- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes including hr-workflows, runtime-scan, version-history, plugins, json-schema-validator

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Scan with `--noAi` and no plugins behaves as before (regression)
- [ ] Plugin transform hooks still receive and may return a `KnowledgeGraph` with added facts
- [ ] `mergeConflicts` has no duplicates from removed graph resets

## Regression
- [ ] `integrations/hr-workflows` scan + export unchanged
- [ ] `plugins.test.ts` scan with plugin facts still passes
- [ ] `recommendations.integration.test.ts` still passes

## Assumptions
- Second `buildEntityGraph` was redundant; `linkRecordsToGraph` only enriches JSON records, not graph topology
- AI merge appends facts at end of array (`mergeAiProposals` contract)

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` — single `factGraph` for merge/AI/plugin transforms; AI merges only appended facts; one `buildEntityGraph` before `linkRecordsToGraph`
- `packages/cli/src/hr-workflows.integration.test.ts` — graph/pages feature link consistency assertion
- Tests: existing integration suite (minimal matrix)
